subtasks.title: Add httpx dependency and create persistent HTTP client
subtasks.description: Add `httpx>=0.27.0` to requirements.txt and create a module-level `httpx.Client` instance in `backend/http_client.py` with connection pooling. Preserve existing proxy support by configuring the client with proxy settings from network_settings. The client should be lazily initialized or module-level singleton to enable connection reuse across all requests. Ensure the client is properly closed on process exit if possible, or document that connection cleanup is handled by OS process termination.
acceptanceCriteria: `httpx` added to requirements.txt with appropriate version constraint
Module-level `httpx.Client` instance exists with connection pooling (limits configured)
Proxy configuration from `network_settings` is passed to the client
Existing imports and module structure are preserved (no breaking changes to other modules)
Code passes lint/typecheck

subtasks.title: Migrate request_text and request_json to httpx.Client
subtasks.description: Rewrite `request_text` and `request_json` functions to use the module-level `httpx.Client` instead of `urllib.request`. Preserve all existing behavior: HTTP method handling, header merging (including default accept and user-agent), body serialization (bytes/str/JSON), timeout handling, proxy support via `_build_opener` logic adapted for httpx, and error translation to `HttpRequestError` (HTTP status errors with body detail, URL errors). Remove `urllib.request` imports once no longer needed. Keep function signatures identical to avoid breaking callers.
acceptanceCriteria: `request_text` uses `httpx.Client.request()` instead of `urllib.request`
`request_json` continues to delegate to `request_text` (or both use shared client)
All header merging behavior preserved (default accept, user-agent, content-type)
Body serialization for bytes/str/dict preserved
Timeout configuration preserved
HTTP errors translated to `HttpRequestError` with status code, reason, and body detail
URL errors translated to `HttpRequestError`
Function signatures remain unchanged
Code passes lint/typecheck

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for http_client module
subtasks.description: Create `tests/test_http_client.py` with comprehensive tests for the migrated `http_client.py`. Use `pytest` and `unittest.mock` (or `respx` for httpx if added) to mock HTTP responses. Cover: (1) request_text with various payloads, (2) request_json with valid/invalid JSON responses, (3) cached_get_json cache hit/miss/stale behavior, (4) HTTP error handling (4xx/5xx), (5) proxy configuration passthrough, (6) header merging. If using `respx`, add it to requirements.txt. Otherwise use `unittest.mock.patch` to mock the httpx client.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file `tests/test_http_client.py` exists and passes with `pytest`
Tests cover request_text with GET/POST and various payload types
Tests cover request_json success and JSON decode error paths
Tests cover cached_get_json fresh cache hit, miss, and stale fallback
Tests cover HTTP error translation to HttpRequestError
Tests cover proxy configuration
Tests cover header merging behavior
All tests pass
